notes: THE DEVIL 12-card gravity deck. Drawn one-per-turn during the Shadow phase. The bar at 1 AM working on the player: the small comforts that are also the chain. Effects bias toward CHAIN gain and toward making the door feel farther.

cards.title: ONE MORE FOR THE ROAD
cards.flavor: The road is right there. You are not on it. Lou doesn't ask; the glass appears.

then.text: You already poured one. The room counts this as honesty.

cards.title: THE BARTENDER POURS UNASKED
cards.flavor: Lou's tongue is between his teeth the way it always is when he's pretending to concentrate.

effects.text: Lou slides the glass over without breaking eye contact with the polishing rag.

cards.title: THE JUKE PLAYS A SONG YOU FORGOT TO MISS
cards.flavor: The opening bars before you know the song. Then your shoulders drop and you know the song.

effects.text: You exhale on the third measure. The exhale is the trap.

cards.title: THE STOOL TAKES YOUR SHAPE
cards.flavor: Tonight it remembers the line of your back. Last Tuesday it was just upholstery.

cards.title: THE GATOR HEAD WATCHES
cards.flavor: Above the backbar. Eyes are glass. The room behaves anyway.

cards.title: SOMEONE SETTLES UP AND LEAVES
cards.flavor: The door swings. Cold air. You don't look up because looking up would be admitting something.

then.text: It was them. You almost did look up. Almost.

cards.title: THE TAB IS LONGER THAN YOU REMEMBER
cards.flavor: Lou taps it twice with the back of a knuckle. Doesn't show it. The taps are the showing.

effects.text: Two taps. You don't ask. He doesn't tell.

cards.title: LAST CALL — THIRTY MINUTES AGO
cards.flavor: Lou rings the bell anyway. The bell is for the regulars. You are now a regular.

effects.text: Last call was thirty minutes ago. The bell is for you.

cards.title: THE 8-BALL WON'T SINK
cards.flavor: Six tries from six angles. The pocket is a polite suggestion.

then.text: You miss the side pocket again. Lou laughs without looking.

cards.title: SCHLITZ. RED. EVERYWHERE.
cards.flavor: The neon is brighter than it was. The pour gloss on the bar top is brighter than it was. The Schlitz red is a colour you can taste now.

cards.title: THE PHONE NOBODY ANSWERS
cards.flavor: The payphone in the back. It rings four times and stops. You count, the second time it rings, and stop counting.

cards.title: THE DOOR HAS BEEN RIGHT THERE THE WHOLE TIME
cards.flavor: Six steps. Six steps. The geometry of the room argues with the geometry of the room. Six steps wins.

options.label: Stand up (cost: discard 2 Action cards; gain: SETTLE UP is free next turn)
